---
output:
  md_document:
    variant: markdown_github
---

# Hello Kitty Color Palettes

```{r, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "figure/",
  fig.height = 1
)
```

## Installation

``` r

```

**Or the development version**

``` r
# devtools::install_github("abigailkeller/hellokitty")
```

## Usage

```{r, palettes_dummy}
#library("hellokitty")

# See all palettes
#names(hkitty_palettes)
```

## Palettes

![](figure/hellokitty1.webp){width=4in}
[Image Source](https://hellokitty.fandom.com/wiki/Hello_Kitty)

```{r, hellokitty1}
#hkitty_palette("hellokitty1")
```

![](figure/hellokitty2.jpg){width=4in}

[Image Source](https://www.parents.com/why-is-hello-kitty-so-popular-11851589)

```{r, hellokitty2}
#hkitty_palette("hellokitty2")
```
